chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1603 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA No. 6283/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025 Mr. Kashif Rehman Abassi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hassan, A.D legal for NADRA. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG and counsel for NADRA, submit that cause of action related to Principle Seat at Karachi and respondents are also resident of Karachi, which fall within the principle seat Karachi. Counsel for the petitioner affirms the same facts and does not press the instant petition on the ground the will approach before the Principle Seat at Karachi. According, under instruction, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
